digest.headline: Global Economies Shudder Amidst Banking Crisis
digest.summary: The collapse of several major banks has triggered a global economic downturn. Markets are bracing for a potential recession as investors scramble for safety.

digest.headline: Tesla Unveils Breakthrough AI-Powered Autonomous Car
digest.summary: Tesla's new AI-driven vehicle promises unparalleled safety and efficiency. The technology is set to revolutionize the automotive industry and reshape urban transportation.

digest.headline: Scientists Discover New Species of Ancient Human
digest.summary: Fossil remains of a previously unknown human species have been unearthed in Africa. The discovery sheds new light on human evolution and challenges existing theories.

digest.headline: US Congress Passes Landmark Climate Change Bill
digest.summary: The bill aims to reduce carbon emissions by 50% by 2030 and invest in renewable energy. Environmental groups hail the legislation as a crucial step towards mitigating climate change.

digest.headline: New COVID-19 Variant Spreads Rapidly Across Globe
digest.summary: The highly contagious variant has caused widespread illness and death, prompting governments to reimpose travel restrictions. Health officials urge citizens to get vaccinated and boosted.

digest.headline: Amazon Acquires Rival Retailer in $10 Billion Deal
digest.summary: The acquisition marks a significant expansion of Amazon's market share and dominance in the e-commerce space. Analysts predict a wave of consolidation in the retail industry.

digest.headline: NASA's Artemis Mission Successfully Lands on Moon
digest.summary: The historic mission marks a major milestone in space exploration and sets the stage for future human settlements on the lunar surface. Astronauts are preparing for the next phase of the mission.
